title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Mentha x piperita, also known as peppermint, essential oils helps with cough because of its natural expectorant properties. The oil's high menthol content helps thin mucus and phlegm, making it easier to expel, thus providing relief from congestion. Additionally, its cooling and decongestant properties help to soothe the throat and calm the cough reflex. As a result, peppermint essential oil can be a valuable natural remedy for relieving coughs and other respiratory issues. Its invigor...
